theory.title: Grammar: Past Simple and Past Continuous

sections.heading: 1. Tóm tắt lý thuyết
sections.content:
📚 Thì Quá khứ đơn và Quá khứ tiếp diễn

⭐ Past Simple (Quá khứ đơn)

Cấu trúc:

  • Khẳng định: S + V2/V-ed
  • Phủ định: S + didn't + V(inf)
  • Nghi vấn: Did + S + V(inf)?

Cách dùng:

  • Hành động hoàn thành trong quá khứ
  • Chuỗi hành động liên tiếp
  • Thói quen trong quá khứ

Dấu hiệu: yesterday, ago, last week/month/year, in 2020, when

⭐ Past Continuous (Quá khứ tiếp diễn)

Cấu trúc:

  • Khẳng định: S + was/were + V-ing
  • Phủ định: S + wasn't/weren't + V-ing
  • Nghi vấn: Was/Were + S + V-ing?

Cách dùng:

  • Hành động đang diễn ra tại 1 thời điểm QK
  • Hành động bị gián đoạn
  • 2 hành động song song

Dấu hiệu: at this time yesterday, at 8pm last night, while, when

sections.heading: 2. So sánh Past Simple và Past Continuous
sections.content:
Tiêu chíPast SimplePast Continuous
Hình thứcV2/V-edwas/were + V-ing
Thời gianHành động hoàn thànhHành động đang diễn ra
Ví dụShe studied hard.She was studying at 8pm.
Kết hợpWhen + Past SimpleWhile + Past Continuous

🔥 Công thức kết hợp quan trọng:

  • When + Past Simple, Past Continuous:
    When he arrived, I was studying. (Khi anh ấy đến, tôi đang học.)
  • Past Continuous + when + Past Simple:
    I was studying when he arrived. (Tôi đang học thì anh ấy đến.)
  • While + Past Continuous, Past Simple:
    While I was studying, he arrived. (Trong khi tôi đang học, anh ấy đến.)
  • While + Past Continuous, Past Continuous:
    While I was studying, she was cooking. (Trong khi tôi đang học, cô ấy đang nấu ăn.)

sections.heading: 3. Năm ví dụ minh họa
sections.content:
Example 1: Past Simple - Completed action

"Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1903."

→ Marie Curie đã giành giải Nobel Vật lý năm 1903. (Hành động hoàn thành trong quá khứ)

Example 2: Past Continuous - Action in progress

"At 10pm last night, I was reading a biography of Steve Jobs."

→ Lúc 10 giờ tối qua, tôi đang đọc tiểu sử của Steve Jobs. (Hành động đang diễn ra tại 1 thời điểm cụ thể)

Example 3: Interrupted action (When)

"I was watching a documentary when my friend called me."

→ Tôi đang xem phim tài liệu thì bạn tôi gọi điện. (Hành động đang diễn ra bị gián đoạn)

Example 4: Parallel actions (While)

"While she was studying medicine, he was working as a teacher."

→ Trong khi cô ấy đang học y, anh ấy đang làm giáo viên. (Hai hành động song song)

Example 5: Sequential actions (Past Simple)

"He graduated from university, found a job, and started his career."

→ Anh ấy tốt nghiệp đại học, tìm được việc, và bắt đầu sự nghiệp. (Chuỗi hành động liên tiếp)

sections.heading: 4. Các dạng bài tập thường gặp
sections.content:
📝 Dạng bài tập Grammar

Dạng 1: Chia động từ đúng thì

Ví dụ: While I (study) _____, my brother (play) _____ games.

→ Answer: was studying / was playing

Dạng 2: Chọn đáp án đúng

Ví dụ: She _____ dinner when the phone rang. (cooked / was cooking)

→ Answer: was cooking

Dạng 3: Kết hợp câu với When/While

Ví dụ: I was reading. He arrived. → I was reading when he arrived.

→ Hoặc: When he arrived, I was reading.

Dạng 4: Tìm lỗi sai

Ví dụ: When I was seeing him, he worked in the garden.

→ Answer: was seeing → saw (hoặc worked → was working)

exercises.question: Choose the correct answer: 'She _____ a book when I called her.'
exercises.explanation: Dùng Past Continuous vì hành động đang diễn ra (was reading) khi có hành động khác xen vào (called).

exercises.question: Complete: 'While they _____ dinner, the lights went out.'
exercises.explanation: Dùng Past Continuous (were having) với 'while' để diễn tả hành động đang diễn ra.

exercises.question: Choose the correct form: 'Marie Curie _____ two Nobel Prizes in her lifetime.'
exercises.explanation: Dùng Past Simple (won) vì đây là hành động hoàn thành trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: Select the right answer: 'What _____ at 8pm yesterday?'
exercises.explanation: Dùng Past Continuous (were you doing) vì hỏi về hành động đang diễn ra tại thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: Complete: 'He _____ his homework, then _____ TV.'
exercises.explanation: Dùng Past Simple cho cả hai động từ vì đây là chuỗi hành động liên tiếp trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: Choose: 'When I _____ home, my family _____ dinner.'
exercises.explanation: When + Past Simple (arrived), Past Continuous (were having) - hành động ngắn xen vào hành động dài.

exercises.question: Select: 'While she _____ in Paris, she _____ French.'
exercises.explanation: While + Past Continuous (was living), Past Simple (learned) hoặc cả hai đều Past Continuous nếu song song.

exercises.question: Complete: 'They _____ football when it started to rain.'
exercises.explanation: Past Continuous (were playing) vì hành động đang diễn ra khi có sự việc khác xảy ra.

exercises.question: Choose: 'I _____ him at the party last night.'
exercises.explanation: Past Simple (saw) với thời gian xác định 'last night'.

exercises.question: Select: 'At this time yesterday, we _____ for our exam.'
exercises.explanation: Past Continuous (were studying) với 'at this time yesterday' - thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ.

exercises.question_text: Decide if the sentences are grammatically correct (True) or incorrect (False):
options: She was studying when her friend called.
While I watched TV, he was cooking.
When I saw him, he worked in the garden.
exercises.explanation: a) Correct - Past Continuous + when + Past Simple. b) Correct - While có thể dùng với Past Simple hoặc Past Continuous. c) Incorrect - Cần thời điểm cụ thể cho Past Continuous, nên sửa thành 'played'. d) Incorrect - Nên là 'was working' (hành động đang diễn ra).

exercises.question_text:
Read the story and decide if the verb tenses are used correctly (True) or incorrectly (False):

'Yesterday, I was walking in the park when I saw an old friend. We were stopping and talked for an hour.'
exercises.explanation: a) Correct - Past Continuous cho hành động đang diễn ra. b) Correct - Past Simple cho hành động ngắn. c) Incorrect - Nên là 'stopped' (Past Simple) vì là hành động ngắn, hoàn thành. d) Correct - Past Simple cho hành động hoàn thành.

exercises.question_text: Identify if these time expressions are typically used with Past Simple (True) or Past Continuous (False):
exercises.explanation: a) True - 'yesterday' dùng với Past Simple. b) False - thời điểm cụ thể dùng với Past Continuous. c) False - 'while' thường đi với Past Continuous. d) True - 'when' với hành động hoàn thành dùng Past Simple.

exercises.passage: Marie Curie was born in Poland in 1867. When she was young, she dreamed of becoming a scientist, but women were not allowed to attend university in Poland at that time. In 1891, she moved to Paris to study at the Sorbonne. While she was studying there, she met Pierre Curie, a French physicist. They fell in love and got married in 1895. Together, they were working on radioactivity research when they discovered two new elements: polonium and radium. In 1903, Marie and Pierre won the Nobel Prize in Physics. Sadly, Pierre died in an accident in 1906. Despite this tragedy, Marie continued her research. She was working tirelessly in her laboratory when she won her second Nobel Prize in Chemistry in 1911, becoming the first person to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences.

questions.question: What tense is used in 'she dreamed of becoming a scientist'?
questions.explanation: Past Simple được dùng cho hành động trong quá khứ.

questions.question: Why is Past Continuous used in 'While she was studying there'?
options: To show an action in progress
questions.explanation: Past Continuous diễn tả hành động đang diễn ra trong quá khứ.

questions.question: In 'they were working on radioactivity research when they discovered', which action happened first?
questions.explanation: Hành động 'were working' đang diễn ra trước khi 'discovered' xảy ra.

questions.question: What tense is 'got married' and why?
questions.explanation: Past Simple cho hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ.

questions.question: Why is Past Continuous used in 'She was working tirelessly'?
options: To emphasize the ongoing nature of her work
questions.explanation: Past Continuous nhấn mạnh tính liên tục của công việc.

exercises.passage: Last Saturday was an eventful day for the Johnson family. At 7am, Mr. Johnson was preparing breakfast while Mrs. Johnson was getting ready for work. Their son, Tom, was still sleeping when his alarm went off at 7:30. He quickly got up, took a shower, and had breakfast. At 9am, the family was driving to the shopping mall when they saw a car accident on the highway. They stopped to help and called the police. While they were waiting for the police to arrive, Tom was taking photos of the scene. After the police came, the family continued their journey. They reached the mall at 11am and spent the whole afternoon shopping. When they were leaving the mall at 5pm, it started to rain heavily. They ran to their car and drove home. That evening, while they were having dinner, they talked about their unusual day.

questions.question: What were Mr. and Mrs. Johnson doing at 7am?
options: They were preparing and getting ready
questions.explanation: Lúc 7 giờ sáng, ông Johnson đang chuẩn bị bữa sáng và bà Johnson đang chuẩn bị đi làm.

questions.question: Which tense is used for 'got up, took a shower, and had breakfast'?
questions.explanation: Dùng Past Simple cho chuỗi hành động liên tiếp đã hoàn thành.

questions.question: What was happening when they saw the accident?
questions.explanation: Họ đang lái xe (were driving) khi nhìn thấy tai nạn.

questions.question: Why is Past Continuous used in 'while they were waiting'?
options: To show an action in progress during that time
questions.explanation: Past Continuous diễn tả hành động đang diễn ra trong khoảng thời gian đó.

questions.question: What tense is used in 'it started to rain'?
questions.explanation: Past Simple cho hành động bắt đầu xảy ra.

exercises.question_text:
Complete the sentences with the correct form of the verbs in brackets:

1. While I _____ (walk) to school, I _____ (meet) my old friend.
2. She _____ (study) English when her mother _____ (call) her.
3. They _____ (watch) TV at 8pm last night.
4. When he _____ (arrive), we _____ (have) dinner.
exercises.correct:
1. was walking / met
2. was studying / called
3. were watching
4. arrived / were having
exercises.explanation: 1. Past Continuous + Past Simple (hành động đang diễn ra gặp hành động ngắn). 2. Past Continuous + when + Past Simple. 3. Past Continuous tại thời điểm cụ thể. 4. When + Past Simple, Past Continuous.

exercises.question_text:
Fill in the blanks with the correct past tense:

1. Marie Curie _____ (win) two Nobel Prizes in her lifetime.
2. While she _____ (work) in the laboratory, she _____ (discover) radium.
3. What _____ you _____ (do) at 9pm yesterday?
4. He _____ (read) a book, then _____ (go) to bed.
exercises.correct:
1. won
2. was working / discovered
3. were / doing
4. read / went
exercises.explanation: 1. Past Simple (hành động hoàn thành). 2. While + Past Continuous, Past Simple. 3. Past Continuous tại thời điểm cụ thể. 4. Past Simple cho chuỗi hành động.

exercises.question_text:
Complete with when or while:

1. _____ I was cooking, the phone rang.
2. She was reading _____ her brother came home.
3. _____ did you see him? - Yesterday.
4. _____ they were traveling, they took many photos.
exercises.explanation: 1. While + Past Continuous. 2. Past Continuous + when + Past Simple. 3. When hỏi về thời gian. 4. While + Past Continuous.

exercises.question_text:
Correct the mistakes in these sentences:

1. I was seeing him yesterday.
2. While she cooked, I was watching TV.
3. They were play football when it rained.
4. When I arrived, she works in the garden.
exercises.correct:
1. saw
2. was cooking
3. playing
4. was working
exercises.explanation: 1. 'see' không dùng continuous → saw. 2. While thường + Past Continuous → was cooking. 3. were + V-ing → were playing. 4. Hành động đang diễn ra → was working.

exercises.question:
Write a paragraph (100-120 words) about an important event in your life or in history. Use both Past Simple and Past Continuous tenses. Include:
- When and where it happened
- What you/people were doing before the event
- What happened (the main event)
- What happened after

Use at least 3 sentences with Past Continuous and 3 sentences with Past Simple.
exercises.answer_guide:
Sample answer:

Last year, I experienced an unforgettable moment when I received my exam results. It was a sunny morning in July. I was having breakfast with my family when my phone rang. My hands were shaking as I opened the message. The results showed that I had passed with excellent grades! I was so happy that I jumped up and hugged my parents. While my mother was crying with joy, my father was calling our relatives to share the good news. That afternoon, we went out to celebrate. My friends were waiting for me at the restaurant when I arrived. We talked, laughed, and took many photos together. That day taught me that hard work and determination always pay off. It was truly one of the happiest days of my life.
exercises.explanation: Bài viết cần kết hợp Past Simple (passed, jumped, went, arrived) và Past Continuous (was having, were shaking, was crying, was calling, were waiting) để kể về một sự kiện quan trọng.
